text:
HollywoodiconTom CruiseleftOlympicsviewers all saying the same thing as they were left shocked at his dramatic arrival at the Paris closing ceremony.

Cruise appeared at the ceremony as part of the Los Angeles handover, with huge stars such as H.E.R and Billie Eilish taking on the handover celebration ahead of the 2028 competition.

TheHollywoodstar stole the show as he made a dramatic appearance during the handover portion of the ceremony, as he rappeled from the roof of the Stade de France, jumping down the huge height on just a wire before landing on the ground.

Tom then quickly ran down the field before jumping on a motorbike and riding away with the Olympic flag attached to the back while H.E.R performed the US national anthem.

He is known for his love of performing his own high-octane stunts, from jumping out of planes to climing to the top of the Burj Khalifa, and it seems Paris was no exception in the exhilarating display.



In an extra clip, Tom then flew to Los Angeles before skydiving to the ground and heading straight to the Hollywood sign, which featured Olympic rings, before he jumped down it.

He encountered US cyclist Kate Courtney, who took the flag from him before passing onto Olympic champion Michael Johnson and then skateboarding Jagger Eaton.

Fans rushed to social media to share their shock at the event, as one said: "Tom Cruise you absolute nutter", as another agreed: "What an entrance from Tom Cruise! ICONIC!!!!"

A third chimed in: "Tom cruise saved the show," while a fourth said: "Tom Cruise the legend you are."

Don't miss:Tom Cruise’s most jaw-dropping stunts as he wows at Paris Olympics 2024

Don't miss:One of the best action films ever is now streaming for free on ITVX

Don't miss:One of the best action movies ever is streaming on Channel 4 for limited time

Cruise had been expected to do a stunt after he was seen in Paris celebrating the games, as he was seen cheering on American gymnast Simone Biles in the stands.

His ex-wife Nicole Kidman and her husband Keith Urban were also seen at the Paris event, although they opted for a skateboarding event.

Meanwhile, Cruise was later joined by Red Hot Chilli Peppers, who performed their iconic song on the beach from Los Angeles, before Billie took over the festivities.

title: Tom Cruise leaves Olympics fans saying same thing as 'huge stunt' sparks frenzy | TV & Radio | Showbiz & TV | Express.co.uk
author: Sasha Morris
description: Hollywood legend Tom Cruise left Olympics viewers all saying the same thing during the Paris closing ceremony.
